name: Indian Chicken Curry - with Coke
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp curry powder (or more for experimentation)
1 cup coffee cream or evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken pieces.
2. In a pot of boiling salted water, cook the chicken with a few celery tops. Cover and simmer about 1 hour or until fork-tender. Drain and strain the broth, reserving.
3. Bone the chicken and cut it into 1/2-inch pieces to measure about 2-1/2 cups.
4. In a skillet, melt the butter/margarine. Add the apple, onion, and curry powder and saute for 5 minutes, blending well.
5. Stir in the raisins, 1 cup of the reserved chicken broth, and the Coca-Cola.
